lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਨਾਸੇ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kott janam ke kilabikh naase har charanee chit laae |2|
lines.english: The sins of millions of incarnations are washed away, by focusing your consciousness on the Lord's feet. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕਾ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਧਰਮ ਕੀ ਪਉੜੀ ਕੋ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sant kaa maarag dharam kee paurree ko vaddabhaagee paae |
lines.english: The way of the Saints is the ladder of righteous living, found only by great good fortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਸਤਤਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਸਦਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਪਨੇ ਜਿਨਿ ਪੂਰੀ ਕਲ ਰਾਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: ausatat karahu sadaa prabh apane jin pooree kal raakhee |
lines.english: So sing the Praises of your God forever; His almighty power is perfect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਘਨ ਬਿਨਾਸਨ ਸਭਿ ਦੁਖ ਨਾਸਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bighan binaasan sabh dukh naasan satigur naam drirraaeaa |
lines.english: The True Guru has implanted the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within me; it is the Eliminator of obstructions, the Destroyer of all pains.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਭਏ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਖੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh bhe pavitraa satigur kee sach saakhee |3|
lines.english: All beings and creatures are purified, listening to the True Teachings of the True Guru. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਏ ਪਾਪ ਭਏ ਸਭਿ ਪਾਵਨ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖਿ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ॥੪॥੩॥੫੩॥
lines.translit: khoe paap bhe sabh paavan jan naanak sukh ghar aaeaa |4|3|53|
lines.english: All of my sins were erased, and I have been purified; servant Nanak has returned to his home of peace. ||4||3||53||
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:
The Guru, the Lord of the world, is my Savior.
All beings have become kind and compassionate to me. ||1||
My home and all my possessions are Yours.
O Lord Master, You are the ocean of excellence.
You dwell in the hearts of Your slaves, Lord.
Meditating on the Guru's feet, I am in bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਉ ਕਤਹਿ ਨਹੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣਾ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhau kateh nahee prabh saranaa | rahaau |
lines.english: There is no fear at all, in God's Sanctuary. ||Pause||
God has laid the eternal foundation.
You are my Almighty Lord and Master. ||2||
You are my strength, wealth and support.
is saved by God Himself.
By His Grace, He has blessed me with the sublime essence of the Naam.
All joy and pleasure then came to me. ||3||
Whoever finds the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy,
With each and every breath, meditate on God;
everyone rises up and bows down at my feet.
O Nanak, sing the songs of joy to the Lord. ||4||4||54||
God became my helper and my best friend;
meeting God, who is so pleasing to my mind.
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:
Celestial peace and bliss have come,
and the unstruck melody of the celestial sound current ever resounds within me. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਮਨੁ ਲੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: har kee prem bhagat man leenaa |
lines.english: My mind is absorbed in loving devotional worship of the Lord,
and I attained salvation. ||1||
The Perfect Guru showered me with His Mercy,
my dependence on other people is totally finished.
The Lord's feet are my all-powerful shelter and support;
I have found the Life of the world, the Great Giver;
My mind's desires have been fulfilled;
God has cut away the noose of death.
in joyful rapture, I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||2||
I am rid of all the pains of countless incarnations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har prabh bin avar na koee |3|
lines.english: Without the Lord God, there is no other at all. ||3||
wherever I look, He is there.
In His Mercy, God has protected and preserved me.
O Nanak, I have found eternal peace. ||4||5||55||
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:
I have meditated on the Naam, the Name of the Fearless Lord;
the fever has left my family.
The Perfect Guru has saved us.
The Creator has brought utter peace to my home;
I sought the Sanctuary of the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਹਜ ਸੁਖ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਉਪਜੇ ਮਨੁ ਹੋਆ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖਾਲਾ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saant sehaj sukh khin meh upaje man hoaa sadaa sukhaalaa | rahaau |
lines.english: Tranquility, intuitive peace and poise welled up in an instant, and my mind was comforted forever. ||Pause||
The Transcendent Lord Himself has become my Protector.
which has cured all disease.
The Lord, Har, Har, gave me the medicine of His Name,
He extended His Mercy to me,
and resolved all these affairs. ||2||
He did not take my merits or demerits into account.
The Word of the Guru's Shabad has become manifest,
God confirmed His loving nature;
